metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: spec-driven-dev
plugins.description: Spec-driven development with structured directories, borrowing ideas from Kiro and Spec-kit

plugins.name: basedpyright-lsp
plugins.description: Enable basedpyright LSP server for Python

plugins.name: python-dev
plugins.description: Python development guidelines for project management and code style

plugins.name: theo-calvin-testing
plugins.description: Differential testing with tc - input.json to output.json, diffed against expected.json

plugins.name: session-setup
plugins.description: Automatically prompt execution of Session Setup steps from CLAUDE.md on session start

plugins.name: ticket-cli
plugins.description: Integration for the tk CLI ticket system - git-backed issue tracking for AI agents

plugins.name: auto-memory
plugins.description: Persistent auto-memory across sessions with configurable storage location

plugins.name: frontmatter
plugins.description: Manage AI provenance metadata blocks in source files to track review status, rule references, and access control

plugins.name: better-comments
plugins.description: Structured [AI] comment blocks with provenance, context, intent, and assumptions for meaningful code review
